category_sources: Official Tcl Developer Xchange describes Tcl and Tk core development and documentation.
source_facts.description says Tcl/Tk is the Tool Command Language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description names Tool Command Language and package id is tcl-tk.
source_facts.homepage is the official Tcl Developer Xchange.
docs_sources: Official Tcl/Tk site provides man pages and documentation from the project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Tcl/Tk Core Development site states canonical source repositories are hosted at core.tcl-lang.org, with Tcl source at core.tcl-lang.org/tcl/.
tags_sources: Official Tcl/Tk pages describe Tcl as a language and Tk as the GUI toolkit.
